meaning: 昌迪加尔[印度北部城市](旁遮普邦和哈里亚纳邦首府)
examples: Levittown, Chandigarh and the British New Towns are examples of artificial cities.

A child of a domestic worker sleeps in a hammock in the northern Indian city of Chandigarh July 26, 2010.
Scientists presented the results of several pilot projects at the Indian Science Congress in Chandigarh.
